name: Common Cold
description: A viral infection affecting the nose and throat. Usually mild but can cause discomfort.
solution: Rest, drink warm fluids, and take over-the-counter medicines if needed.

name: Fever
description: Fever is usually a sign that your body is fighting an infection.
solution: Stay hydrated, take paracetamol if necessary, and rest well.

name: Headache
description: A common condition that can be caused by stress, dehydration, or migraine.
solution: Drink water, rest in a dark room, and take mild pain relievers if needed.

name: Stomach Ache
description: Pain in the abdomen often caused by indigestion, gas, or food poisoning.
solution: Eat light food, avoid spicy items, and drink warm water.

name: Diarrhea
description: A condition of frequent loose or watery stools, often due to infection.
solution: Drink ORS (Oral Rehydration Solution), avoid oily food, and stay hydrated.
